text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year! New Year's here is awful
exciting!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And I know just what to do at a shrine! Ya toss a
coin into the collection box and then give a big
round of applause!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, really? I just figured the gods would enjoy it
more if I set the mood.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Aaanyway, how 'bout we mosey on over to a
shrine?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up paying a visit to a shrine with Taiki
Shuttle...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I asked the gods to sit back and watch me
become Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I put in plenty of work last year, so now we just
gotta wait for the announcement!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they'll be all smiles when I'm picked for
the title! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What did ya pray for, Trainer? Hopin' to become
prime minister of Japan?
choice_data_list: I prayed for you to stay healthy.

I prayed for you to keep growing and
flourishing.
I prayed for your running to improve.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What?! You prayed for me?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Did ya know about me pullin' an
all-nighter last night?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll nix the night owl act so I can stay
healthy and strong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we wrap up our shrine visit. It won't be
long now until the Umamusume of the Year
announcement!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thanks! I'm sure I'll shoot up just like a
beanstalk!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep growin' and growin' so I can catch
hold of my dream with both hands!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I feel power wellin' up inside me all of a sudden!
Let's get training, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we wrap up our shrine visit. It won't be
long now until the Umamusume of the Year
announcement!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Improve? You mean, like, learn some new tricks?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! I think we're on the same page!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm still not very good at breakin' outta the gate,
so make sure to include that in your prayer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we wrap up our shrine visit. It won't be
long now until the Umamusume of the Year
announcement!
